scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install && npm run build
scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function copyDir(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const sp=path.join(s,f),dp=path.join(d,f);fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()?copyDir(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}copyDir('client/dist','server/dist/public')"
